text.title: hybrid-search-implementation Procedure
text.summary: Six-step build procedure for production HybridSearchService.

step.name: pick-backend-path
step.action: Native (Weaviate/Qdrant) vs client-fusion (Elasticsearch) vs sparse-dense (Pinecone). Use the decision tree.

step.name: pre-compute-sparse
step.action: For Qdrant/Pinecone, run BM25Encoder.fit(corpus) and persist; for Weaviate skip (server-side); for ES build/refresh BM25 index.

step.name: implement-search-method
step.action: Implement parallel dense + sparse legs (asyncio.gather), capture per-leg ranks, apply RRF or linear fusion.

step.name: eval-and-tune
step.action: Run NDCG@10 evaluation; if linear fusion, sweep alpha; ship the winner with eval evidence.

step.name: instrument-and-ship
step.action: Log per-leg ranks + latency_ms; gate behind feature flag; ramp gradually.
